    1. getNetworkSampler(Long, boolean, Sampler, Simulation)

Class NetworkSamplerFactory

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.sampling.factories.NetworkSamplerFactory
public class NetworkSamplerFactory extends Object
Factory class for creating instances of AbstractNetworkSampler.

This class encapsulates the logic for constructing network samplers used in simulation environments. It currently returns a standard network sampler, optionally initialized with a random seed that can be modified based on the simulation ID.

Usage example:


 NetworkSamplerFactory factory = new NetworkSamplerFactory();
 AbstractNetworkSampler sampler = factory.getNetworkSampler(
         42L, true, outerSampler, simulation);
See Also:

  • StandardNetworkSampler

  • Method Details

    • getNetworkSampler

      public AbstractNetworkSampler getNetworkSampler(Long seed, boolean seedFlag, Sampler outerSampler, Simulation sim)
      Creates an AbstractNetworkSampler instance.

      This method constructs a StandardNetworkSampler, optionally initializing it with a seed that can be adjusted based on the simulation ID.

      Parameters:
      seed - an optional base seed for random number generation; if null, no seed is set
      seedFlag - if true, the simulation ID is added to the base seed to ensure variability across simulations
      outerSampler - the outer sampler that contains the sampler being created
      sim - the current simulation context, used to obtain the simulation ID
      Returns:
      an initialized AbstractNetworkSampler ready for use in the simulation
